mapper.delete:
delete from report_pust_leader_approval where auto_create_id in
#{createId}
mapper.select:
select rpla.*,su.real_name apply_person_name,su2.real_name appro_person_name from report_pust_leader_approval rpla left join sys_user su on su.user_id = rpla.apply_person_id left join sys_user su2 on su2.user_id = rpla.appro_person_id where 1=1
and rpla.report_name like concat('%',#{reportPustLeaderApproval.reportName},'%')
and su.real_name like concat('%',#{reportPustLeaderApproval.applyPersonName},'%')
order by rpla.create_time desc
